channel.title: vishwaCTF on MadrHacks
channel.description: Recent content in vishwaCTF on MadrHacks

item.title: vishwaCTF
item.description: Thoughts on the CTF This was the first CTF in which our fresh recruits (from CC.IT 2021 program) participated in. It was a rather guessy CTF, but we’re pretty happy about the result: 1st place! Anyway, here are the writeups, divided in categories! Crypto A typical day at work The manager at mcgronalds seemed very happy today, after a tedious day at work, he shed tears of joy and said this “yonvkahj_on_jeyonx_jeajon”… can you tell us what he said?
